Theme
Sign in Request Demo

Agentic AI for
Brand & Product Experiences

GLUCOSE AI Experience Agents represent your brand across every channel—engaging customers, delivering product experiences, and driving outcomes autonomously across every touchpoint.

Why Choose GLUCOSE

Own Every Customer Moment

Your customers expect instant, personal, on-brand interactions at every touchpoint. GLUCOSE makes that possible—without scaling headcount, without losing brand control, and without waiting on engineering.

Anyone. Anywhere. Anytime.

No install, no sign-up, no skills required. Engage and provide intuitive support 24/7 to all your captive users, on their terms.

Contextual & Personalized

Autonomously adapts to shifting user intent and context, delivering seamless, non-linear engagement across the customer journey.

Multimodal

Engages effortlessly through text, voice, images, and video for an intuitive, frictionless experience across channels.

Multilingual

Communicates naturally in 50+ languages, delivering culturally aware, context-driven interactions.

Autonomous

Goal-driven AI that autonomously assists, engages, and makes real-time decisions, handling complex, real-world customer interactions.

Across Touchpoints

Deploy GLUCOSE across WhatsApp, Telegram, Line, Zalo, Viber, Facebook Messenger, and any other touchpoint.

What Sets Us Apart

Built Different. By Design.

Every capability of GLUCOSE is purpose-built so your brand shows up brilliantly for every customer—across every channel, every moment.

01 — JOURNEYS

Agents that follow your playbook

Define the customer journeys you want your AI to follow—step by step. Agents handle complex, multi-step experiences from problem identification to resolution, keeping context across every interaction.

Playbook Builder Goal-Driven Agents Contextual Memory Live Updates
02 — KNOWLEDGE

Knowledge that stays current

Your documents—manuals, FAQs, marketing materials—are automatically processed into knowledge that your AI agents can draw from instantly. Always accurate, always up to date.

Auto-Processing Smart Search Knowledge Pipeline Always Current
03 — TESTING & INSIGHTS

Quality you can measure

Test your AI agents before they go live. Simulate real conversations, measure quality with your own metrics, and catch issues before customers see them. Every interaction generates insights that flow back to your CRM.

Conversation Testing Custom Metrics Quality Assurance Customer Insights
04 — MANAGEMENT CONSOLE

Control without code

The GLUCOSE Management Console puts business users in charge. Configure journeys, deploy updates, monitor performance, and manage access—all through an intuitive interface. No developers required for day-to-day operations.

No-Code Interface Real-Time Monitoring Deployment Control Access Management
Works With Your Systems

Seamlessly Integrated

GLUCOSE connects to your existing tools and platforms. Deploy across channels, integrate with enterprise systems, and maintain your current workflows.

One-Click Connectors

Connect third-party services to enhance your GLUCOSE environment — from e-commerce platforms to CRMs and messaging channels.

Categorized by Function

Browse connectors by type — Portfolio, Corpus, Tools, Users, Analytics, and Channels — to find exactly what you need.

Real-Time Status

See which connectors are active, pending configuration, or available to connect — all from a single management panel.

Request New Connectors

Need an integration we don't have yet? Request new connectors directly from the panel and our team will build it.

Insights

Journey Analytics

Understand how your AI agents perform, uncover customer patterns, and optimize every interaction with real-time analytics and reporting.

Key Metrics

Track agent performance against critical KPIs — session volume, conversation depth, GLUCOSE Score, and customer satisfaction.

Journey Explorer

Visualize conversation flows and transition paths to understand how customers navigate through your AI agent experiences.

Score Distribution

Monitor quality scores across all conversations to identify trends, spot anomalies, and continuously improve agent behavior.

Real-Time Alerts

Get notified when agent performance drops below thresholds so you can intervene before it impacts customer experience.

Technology

Enterprise-Grade Solution

GLUCOSE runs on enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure—reliable, secure, and fully managed. You focus on experiences, not servers.

Model-AgnosticMulti-ModalSingle-TenantTechnology-Agnostic

Best-in-Class AI

Powered by the world's best AI models—Claude, GPT-4, Gemini—so your agents are always smart, natural, and adaptive.

Security & Privacy

Enterprise-grade security with end-to-end encryption, secure authentication, and GDPR/PDPA compliance built in.

No-Code Management

Intuitive Management Console allows business users to create, configure, and monitor AI Experience Agents without technical expertise.

Live Updates

Update your AI agents instantly—no downtime, no waiting. Test and iterate in real time.

Technology Agnostic

Your Stack. Your Choice.

GLUCOSE connects to your channels, enterprise systems, AI models, and cloud providers. No vendor lock-in—your stack, your choice.

AI Models

Messaging Channels

Enterprise Systems

Cloud Providers

Certifications

GLUCOSE

Your playbook. Autonomously executed.

GLUCOSE follows your playbooks, connects to your systems, and handles customer interactions—with precision, not scripts.

GMC

Management Console

No-code interface for business users to configure, deploy, and monitor AI Experience Agents in real-time.

PlaybooksTestingAnalyticsLive UpdatesAccess

Corpus

Knowledge Base

AI-ready knowledge repositories for accurate, contextual responses.

Manuals FAQs Products Policies Marketing

Tools

System Integrations

Connect to your existing systems. GLUCOSE acts. Your systems record.

Salesforce HubSpot SAP Zendesk ServiceNow Dynamics REST API Webhooks

Analytics

Insights & Data Flow

Customer insights captured and synced back to your systems.

Captures
User IntentPreferencesFeedbackBehavior
Syncs to
CRMCustomer Data PlatformData WarehouseAnalytics Tools
Traditional Chatbots
  • Pre-programmed responses that break when conversations shift
  • Can only provide information, not take action
  • Robotic, template-based responses lacking context
GLUCOSE Agents
  • Goal-driven reasoning through complexity and edge cases
  • Executes tasks: books, updates, processes, resolves
  • Natural dialogue with empathy and brand awareness
Build with GLUCOSE

Partner with us

Build agentic brand representation with brand and product experiences powered by GLUCOSE Agentic AI. Access our architecture documentation, JDL specification, and integration patterns.

JDL Specification

Define conversation logic and agent behaviors using our declarative specification format.

CLI Tools

Scaffold, test, and deploy agents directly from your development environment.

Architecture Guide

Deep-dive into multi-agent orchestration patterns, integration models, and deployment architecture.

Request Access

See what GLUCOSE can do for you

Discover how GLUCOSE can help your enterprise run autonomous brand experiences that reach every customer, in every moment that matters.

Request Demo
